coach_notes: For the Osmosis Health Leadership Initiative, lacking 'firstaid' and 'teamcollaboration' is critical, as this role likely involves health-related community work requiring emergency response and coordinated teamwork. For the Cultural Site Interpreter position, missing 'customerservice' and 'communityengagement' (though you have community events) is a gap, as interpreters need strong visitor interaction skills. For the English and History tutor role, lacking 'classroommanagement' and 'lessonplanning' is essential, as these are core to effective tutoring and structured learning sessions.

jobs.title: Cultural Site Interpreter
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your public speaking, communication, and native Spanish are strong assets for interpreting cultural sites to diverse audiences. Activities and engagement show you can interact with visitors.
jobs.gaps: No direct experience in cultural interpretation or history; may need to learn site-specific content quickly.

jobs.title: English and History tutor
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your tutoring experience, communication, planning, and teamwork directly support this role. English and history align with your skills, and you have high school background.
jobs.gaps: No specific mention of English or history tutoring; may need to highlight relevant subject knowledge.

jobs.title: Osmosis Health Leadership Initiative (Formerly OMEF)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your leadership skills, team leadership, and communication align with a health leadership initiative. Public speaking and planning are also relevant for leading groups or presenting.
jobs.gaps: No specific health or medical background mentioned; may need to demonstrate interest in health leadership or gain foundational knowledge.

jobs.title: Educator I
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your engagement, teamwork, and communication skills are useful for an educator role. Planning and activities suggest you can design learning experiences.
jobs.gaps: No formal education or teaching certification mentioned; may need to show experience with curriculum or classroom management.

jobs.title: Temporary Tutor, Math
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your tutoring experience and planning skills are relevant for a math tutor role. Teamwork and communication help in working with students.
jobs.gaps: No math-specific skills or experience listed; major gap in subject expertise. Need to demonstrate math proficiency or relevant coursework.
